name: Dreaming Back to the Qing Dynasty
overview: Modern-day office worker Xiao Wei is transported to the Qing Dynasty after getting lost in the Forbidden City. Thrust into palace intrigue and torn between powerful princes and Emperor Kangxi, she must navigate shifting loyalties and political tension while repeatedly facing life-altering choices in an unfamiliar era.

trailers.title: 【ENG SUB】Dreaming Back to the Qing Dynasty trailer : A romantic and sweet palace drama will come !
